meta.name: Combat Encounter Balancer
meta.description: A tool to design and balance combat encounters by calculating XP thresholds and providing tactical suggestions.

inputs.name: party_level
inputs.label: Party Level
inputs.description: The average or target level of the player characters.

inputs.name: num_players
inputs.label: Number of Players
inputs.description: The total number of player characters in the party.

inputs.name: party_composition
inputs.label: Party Composition
inputs.description: A brief description of the party's key abilities, classes, and available resources (e.g., spells, healing).

inputs.name: difficulty
inputs.label: Encounter Difficulty
inputs.description: The desired difficulty for the combat encounter.

inputs.name: selected_monsters
inputs.label: Monster Selection
inputs.description: A list of monster names or types to include in the encounter.

inputs.name: battleground_features
inputs.label: Battleground Features
inputs.description: Description of interesting terrain, obstacles, or tactical features for the encounter area.

inputs.name: reward_preferences
inputs.label: Reward Preferences
inputs.description: Notes on desired types of treasure or special reward items for the encounter.

outputs.name: encounter_plan
outputs.label: Balanced Encounter Plan
outputs.description: A complete, balanced encounter plan ready for play.

fields.name: title
fields.label: Encounter Title
fields.description: A suggested name for the combat scenario.

fields.name: balance_analysis
fields.label: Balance Analysis
fields.description: A summary of the encounter's calculated difficulty relative to the party and chosen settings, including warnings or suggestions.

fields.name: total_xp
fields.label: Total Monster XP
fields.description: The combined XP value of all creatures before multipliers.

fields.name: adjusted_xp
fields.label: Adjusted Encounter XP
fields.description: The final XP value of the encounter after applying multipliers for number of monsters.

fields.name: monster_roster
fields.label: Final Monster Roster
fields.description: The list and quantity of creatures for the balanced encounter.

fields.name: encounter_summary
fields.label: Encounter Summary
fields.description: A brief, evocative description of the scene for the Game Master.

fields.name: monster_tactics
fields.label: Suggested Monster Tactics
fields.description: Guidelines on how the monsters might approach the fight, including target priority and ability use.

fields.name: battleground_setup
fields.label: Battleground Setup
fields.description: A detailed description of the combat area, noting key features and potential starting positions for monsters.

fields.name: reward_suggestions
fields.label: Reward Suggestions
fields.description: Ideas for treasure, magic items, or other rewards appropriate for the encounter's difficulty.
